c.f: IF( OR( 'INPUT DATA'!$F$26="Academic Elective (All Other Electives)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$26="Academic Elective (Field Experience / Exposure, and Sports and Arts)", AND('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="TechPro Elective (Work Immersion)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$24=12), AND('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="TechPro Elective (All Other Electives)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$24=12) ), INDIRECT("'" & CU1 & "'!AJ13:AJ113"), "" )

IF( OR( 'INPUT DATA'!$F$26="Academic Elective (All Other Electives)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$26="Academic Elective (Field Experience / Exposure, and Sports and Arts)", AND('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="TechPro Elective (Work Immersion)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$24=12), AND('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="TechPro Elective (All Other Electives)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$24=12) ), INDIRECT("'" & CV1 & "'!AJ13:AJ113"), "" )

IF( OR( 'INPUT DATA'!$F$26="Academic Elective (All Other Electives)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$26="Academic Elective (Field Experience / Exposure, and Sports and Arts)", AND('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="TechPro Elective (Work Immersion)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$24=12), AND('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="TechPro Elective (All Other Electives)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$24=12) ), INDIRECT("'" & CW1 & "'!AJ13:AJ113"), "" )

IF( OR( 'INPUT DATA'!$F$26="Academic Elective (All Other Electives)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$26="Academic Elective (Field Experience / Exposure, and Sports and Arts)", AND('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="TechPro Elective (Work Immersion)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$24=12), AND('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="TechPro Elective (All Other Electives)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$24=12) ), INDIRECT("'" & CX1 & "'!AJ13:AJ113"), "" )
IF(OR('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="Core Subject (All Tracks)", AND('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="TechPro Elective (All Other Electives)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$24=11)),INDIRECT("'" & CY1 & "'!AJ13:AJ113"), "")
IF(OR('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="Core Subject (All Tracks)", AND('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="TechPro Elective (All Other Electives)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$24=11)),INDIRECT("'" & CZ1 & "'!AJ13:AJ113"), "")
IF(OR('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="Core Subject (All Tracks)", AND('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="TechPro Elective (All Other Electives)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$24=11)),INDIRECT("'" & DA1 & "'!AJ13:AJ113"), "")
IF(OR('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="Core Subject (All Tracks)", AND('INPUT DATA'!$F$26="TechPro Elective (All Other Electives)", 'INPUT DATA'!$F$24=11)),INDIRECT("'" & DB1 & "'!AJ13:AJ113"), "")

is.t: Academic Elective (Field Experience / Exposure, and Sports and Arts)
Academic Elective (Field Experience / Exposure, and Sports and Arts)
↑COMPUTATION↑ OF FINAL GRADES: 2 = Average of 2 quarters 4 = Average of 4 quarters

c.f: IFERROR(_xlfn._xlws.FILTER( DK2:DK140, ISNUMBER(SEARCH(DD11, DN2:DN140)) * (DI2:DI140 = DD9)),"Input Grade Level and Select Subject Type")
